title: Mark a slice done
description: A project owner or AI tool marks an FBS slice done so the Build Sequence reflects real progress and coverage stays honest.
iWant: to mark a build slice done once it is finished
soThat: the build sequence reflects real progress and the coverage report stays honest

acceptanceCriteria.description: Marking done advances the FBS execution status and the matching Build Sequence slot status, both validating
acceptanceCriteria.then: the FBS execution status advances and the corresponding Build Sequence slot status is updated, both validating

acceptanceCriteria.description: Mark-done on an unknown FBS id returns a not-found error and writes nothing
acceptanceCriteria.given: a mark-done request for an unknown FBS id
acceptanceCriteria.then: a not-found error is returned and nothing is written

acceptanceCriteria.description: Mark-done only changes execution status fields and leaves the rest of the documents untouched
acceptanceCriteria.then: it changes only execution status fields and leaves the rest of the documents untouched
